description: As the Framework disintegrates, Radcliffe finds himself alone on a virtual beach. Reflecting on his doomed search for meaning and his lost love Agnes, he faces oblivion with melancholy acceptance. The last fragments of the Framework fade as Radcliffe lifts a glass in solitude before disappearing.
location: Framework (virtual reality simulation / Dr. Radcliffe / Aida construct)

transcript.line: Though immortality may have eluded me, perhaps it's for the best. After all what is eternity without my beloved Agnes by my side? This is the way the world ends. Not with a bang, but a...
